title: Aruvaakkaaran Lyrics Kutti Puli Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Aruvaakkaaran
Singer: Padmalatha, Kaushiki Chakrabar
Movie : Kutti Puli
Music : M Ghibran
Lyrics : Vairamuthu		 .

Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Aruvaakkaaran, azhaganperan
adi nenja thechi ponaan thaadikaaran
Aandha kannan, azhuku lungi
aanaalum aasa vaikum meesakaaran

Erai vaithum sikkaadha parava pola
yen kaiyil sikkalaye elayum kaala
odum neeril kaanum karayil
kooda vaaren nizhala pola

Aruvaakkaaran, azhaganperan
adi nenja thechi ponaan thaadikaaran
Aandha kannan, azhuku lungi
aanaalum aasa vaikum meesakaaran

Kiru kiru kiruvena varugudhu oru
kili-paarava paakayila
viru viru viruven urugudhu manam
verasaa nee pogayila

Pogudhey uyir paadhiyile
po pogudhey uyir padhiyila

vidu vidu viduvena viru viruvena
mei kaathu veesayila
mada mada madavena sariyudhu
oru maaraapu aayila

pookavaa un saalaiyila
thangam naan enna theikkavaa
thaliyil katti meikkava
yengum nenja vaangi kolla vaada vaada

Aruvaakkaaran, azhaganperan
adi nenja thechi ponaan thaadikaaran
Aandha kannan, azhuku lungi
aanaalum aasa vaikum meesakaaran

pada padavena puzhmbudhu ponnu
panangaatu mazhayaaga
nazhuvudhu odhungudhu padhungudhu
manam nari kanda nandaaga
odudhey uyir neeraaaga

Karuvizhi kirangudhu mayangudhu
siru kanpaaru neraaga
gala galavena oru sol sollu
yaar paarka poraaga

Konalaai manam aanadhey
naanlaaai adhu saayudhey
annak kayiril thaali katta vaada vaada

Aruvaakkaaran ..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Aruvaakkaaran'?

The song 'Aruvaakkaaran' conveys a sense of joy and celebration, reflecting the vibrant emotions of the characters in the movie.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Kutti Puli'?

Kutti Puli revolves around themes of love and family, showcasing the protagonist's journey through various challenges.

Who is the singer of 'Aruvaakkaaran'?

The song is sung by Padmalatha, known for her melodious voice and captivating performances.

Who composed the music for 'Aruvaakkaaran'?

The music for 'Aruvaakkaaran' was composed by M Ghibran, who is celebrated for his innovative musical style.

When was 'Aruvaakkaaran' released?

'Aruvaakkaaran' was released on May 27, 2013, as part of the Kutti Puli soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Aruvaakkaaran', the vibrant energy of the song perfectly complements the celebratory moments in the movie Kutti Puli. The lyrics, penned by Vairamuthu, evoke feelings of joy and excitement, making it a perfect anthem for festivities. Padmalatha's soulful rendition adds depth to the lively composition by M Ghibran. This song encapsulates the essence of happiness, making it ideal for weddings and celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aruvaakkaaran from Kutti Puli is a vibrant and energetic track that showcases the beautiful vocals of Padmalatha. With the masterful composition of M Ghibran and the poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu, this song captures the essence of celebration and joy. Dive into the lively beats and let the music uplift your spirits!
stanzaMeanings: The one who is fierce, the beautiful one, has broken my heart and left. That person, even if they wear a lungi, has a mustache that desires.
Like a bird that cannot be caught, my hands are empty. In the flowing water, I see reflections, and I come even in the shadows.
The one who is fierce, the beautiful one, has broken my heart and left. That person, even if they wear a lungi, has a mustache that desires.
A little bird is coming, chirping. In the tree, my heart melts, but you are not leaving.
Go, life is in the path, go. Life is in the way.
I will leave, I will leave, even if I am fierce, I will blow away the truth. It is right to change slowly.
Will you decorate my hair with flowers? What will I do? Will you tie it up? Everywhere, my heart is captured, go, go.
The one who is fierce, the beautiful one, has broken my heart and left. That person, even if they wear a lungi, has a mustache that desires.
Like a waterfall, the girl flows like rain, and the heart is lost in the sound of the falling water.
The eyes are shining, and I am lost in the small sight. I will say something, who will listen?
The soul of the truth is like a river, the soul of the truth is like a river.
My heart is not mine anymore, it is lost. Tie it up in the hands of that person, go, go.
Aruvaakkaaran .. English Translation I tried my best :) [english lyric]
